prompt: Create a wide single-panel editorial illustration on an off-white textured paper background. Show an adult Korean male baseball player seated on the floor near the right side of the canvas, cross-legged, slightly hunched, eating a triangular rice ball held in one hand. His face must be intentionally anonymized with a vertical soft-edged beige blur rectangle covering the facial features, while the rest of the head shows short dark hair and ears. He wears a vivid royal-blue professional baseball jersey with dark blue undersleeves, black pants, blue sneakers, and a wristwatch; include a large white team wordmark across the chest resembling “doyo,” the jersey number “1” on the lower front, a yellow rectangular sponsor patch on the upper chest, Korean sponsor lettering on the left chest area, and a large white number on the sleeve. Place exactly 2 small objects on the floor to his left: one upright clear plastic water bottle with a blue label and blue cap, and one small empty white paper cup. Use loose ink outlines, watercolor and marker-style shading, subtle gray cast shadows, and a melancholic sports-cartoon mood. Keep the composition minimal with a lot of blank space on the left, a thin floor line behind the objects and figure, no extra people, no extra props, and no readable text beyond jersey-like markings. The athlete’s jersey color can be customized as royal blue, the jersey number as 1, the anonymizing face cover as soft-edged beige blur rectangle, the food item as triangular rice ball, and the mood as melancholic and lonely.
